understanding.goal_understanding: Finish the current level (BP35) by navigating the tile grid to reach the goal gem tile marked '+', without landing on spikes, using at most 2 attempts and 50 turns per attempt, then continue clearing subsequent levels until the game is won.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT (horizontal only) or CLICK a specific [x,y] tile (typically to remove breakable 'x' blocks). After any horizontal move, gravity automatically carries the character in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile, hit a hazard (spikes 'u'/'v' which immediately end the attempt), or reach the goal '+'. CLICK does not move the player; it modifies the map. UNDO reverses the previous action. The structured state’s left/right landing previews and corridor scan indicate where a move will ultimately land and where passages/drop-offs to new vertical sections exist, guiding safe and efficient routing.
